name: BTG Pactual T. Rowe Price Flexible Emerging Market Debt Fondo De Inversion Fund
summary: BTG Pactual T. Rowe Price Flexible Emerging Market Debt Fondo De Inversion Fund is a flexible emerging market debt investment fund. It is managed by BTG Pactual in partnership with T. Rowe Price and invests in emerging market debt instruments with a flexible investment strategy.
